categories.name: Grants/casts a spell
categories.description: Lets you cast a spell or use a spell-like effect.

categories.name: Fortune effect
categories.description: Grants a fortune effect (roll twice, take the higher result).

categories.name: Misfortune effect
categories.description: Imposes a misfortune effect (roll twice, take the lower result).

categories.name: Movement speed increase
categories.description: Increases a Speed or grants a new movement Speed.

categories.name: Flight
categories.description: Grants a fly Speed or the ability to fly.

categories.name: Resistance
categories.description: Grants resistance to one or more damage types.

categories.name: Weakness
categories.description: Imposes a weakness to one or more damage types.

categories.name: Immunity
categories.description: Grants immunity to a damage type or condition.

categories.name: Fast healing / regeneration
categories.description: Provides fast healing or regeneration each round.

categories.name: Stat/skill bonus
categories.description: Grants a bonus to a check, save, AC, or other statistic.

categories.name: Extra sense
categories.description: Grants a special sense such as darkvision, low-light vision, or scent.

categories.name: Aura effect
categories.description: Emanates an aura that affects nearby creatures.

categories.name: Critical specialization
categories.description: Grants a weapon's critical specialization effect.

categories.name: Bonus damage dice
categories.description: Adds extra dice of damage on a hit.

categories.name: Temporary HP
categories.description: Grants temporary Hit Points.

categories.name: Light source
categories.description: Sheds light or illuminates the area.

categories.name: Healing
categories.description: Restores Hit Points to the wielder or others.

categories.name: Teleportation
categories.description: Teleports a creature to another location.

categories.name: Invisibility
categories.description: Turns a creature invisible.

categories.name: Illusion
categories.description: Creates an illusion or magical disguise.

categories.name: Polymorph/shapechange
categories.description: Transforms or shapechanges a creature's form.
